--- title: Water classification project keywords: fastai sidebar: home_sidebar summary: "The objective of this project is to provide a water color classification based on remote sensed images" description: "The objective of this project is to provide a water color classification based on remote sensed images" ---
{% raw %}
{% endraw %}

Data Preparation

All the processes for cleaning the raw data are defined and explained in the Data_Preparation documentation

EDA - Exploratory Data Analysis

The notebook EDA contains the initial data processing and a exploratory data analysis of the available reflectances

Core Functions

The core functions that are mostly used throughout the notebooks can be found in core documentation This is an example of the wavelength_range function, that returns a list of wavelengths given initial, final and step values, specified in nanometers(nm)

{% raw %} 
wavelength_range(340, 350)

['340', '341', '342', '343', '344', '345', '346', '347', '348', '349', '350']
{% endraw %}
